source_name: Artemis II Ephemeris
redistribution_status: retain original attribution and verify file-level terms
variables_or_content: Orion state vectors and time segments
planned_use: Calibration held-out trajectory validation and release-revision testing
known_limitations: Does not expose all mission-owned force navigation or propulsion parameters; pre/post creation classification is a research audit convention

source_name: Artemis II Daily Agenda
variables_or_content: Burn windows sleep and crew events
known_limitations: Public summary may omit internal timeline detail and is not an executed event log

source_name: Artemis II Overview Timeline
redistribution_status: retain original attribution and verify file-level terms
variables_or_content: Mission events crew phases sleep and maneuvers
known_limitations: Plan differs from executed timing and remains a planning reference

source_name: Orion Reference Guide
redistribution_status: retain original attribution and verify file-level terms
variables_or_content: Mass usable propellant thrust crew capacity and system overview
known_limitations: Values are rounded and the Artemis II delta-v row appears internally mislabeled so that field is excluded

source_name: European Service Module Propulsion
variables_or_content: Engine classes thrust tank configuration and propellants
known_limitations: Does not provide full flight-specific uncertainty distributions

source_name: Optimized Artemis II Trajectory Correction Burn Placement
redistribution_status: retain original attribution and verify record terms
variables_or_content: Objective dispersion margins crew and navigation cases
planned_use: Replication target uncertainty model and constraint design
known_limitations: Study uses mission models not fully released and describes a preflight reference trajectory

source_name: JPL Horizons
redistribution_status: cite retrieval query and JPL instructions
variables_or_content: Earth Moon Sun and planetary state vectors
known_limitations: Queries must be frozen and archived

source_name: DE440 Planetary and Lunar Ephemeris
variables_or_content: Planetary and lunar positions and orientations
known_limitations: Kernel versions and frames must be controlled

source_name: GOES Proton Flux
redistribution_status: cite NOAA archive and retrieval interval
variables_or_content: Historical energetic proton flux
planned_use: Environmental stress strata and exposure proxy
known_limitations: Not an astronaut absorbed-dose measurement

variables_or_content: Human factors habitability sustained translational acceleration and environmental constraints
known_limitations: Requires mission-specific tailoring and provides duration-axis-posture envelopes rather than one scalar acceleration cap

source_name: NASA Standard for Models and Simulations
variables_or_content: Model development validation uncertainty and credibility requirements
known_limitations: Does not set mission-specific acceptance values

source_name: Artemis Program Architecture
variables_or_content: Artemis III and IV architecture and dates
known_limitations: Not a detailed Artemis IV trajectory or vehicle dataset

source_name: Starship Public Vehicle Specifications
variables_or_content: Top-level dimensions capacity thrust and propellant
known_limitations: Insufficient for flight-calibrated HLS guidance and uncertainty modeling

source_name: Artemis II Mission Blog Index

variables_or_content: Executed TLI start time duration mass and approximate propellant consumption

source_name: Artemis II Flight Update Perigee Raise Burn Complete
variables_or_content: Perigee raise duration and planned TLI delta-v

source_name: Evolution of Orion Mission Design for Exploration
variables_or_content: Orion design reference including 328-second main-engine specific impulse

source_name: NASA Sets Coverage for Artemis II Moon Mission
variables_or_content: UTC-convertible Eastern-time burn sleep wake flyby and entry schedule

source_name: General Mission Analysis Tool R2026a

planned_use: Independent agreement still depends on matching frames epochs constants and force settings
